name: Brooks Transportation Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Anne Arundel County, MD area (Pasadena/Baltimore region) — specific districts not disclosed publicly
recent_news: No M&A news. Active family-owned operator since 2009; BBB profile shows Not Rated status. Brand-consistent website (brookstransportationinc.com) markets home-to-school, special needs, and field-trip transport.
fit_notes: Family-owned MD operator (since 2009) with school + special-needs mix — clean fit for Summit's tuck-in profile in MD. Small (~$892K rev) but explicitly SPED-capable, which is high-value. President Ruth Utz is a clear single point-of-contact for succession discussion.

name: Hessian Inc Which Will Do Bus
principals: Possibly Ritankar Das (associated with multiple entities at 1135 Martin Luther King Dr, Hayward); not confirmed for this record
recent_news: No school-bus operations identified. The 1135 Martin Luther King Dr, Hayward address is shared by Hessian Parent Corporation (Stock Corp filed 1/16/2019, status Forfeited–FTB) and other tech/AI LLCs (Progrid Ventures, Blue Willow AI, Gammax) tied to Ritankar Das. Name string 'Inc Which Will Do Bus' appears to be a truncated 'Inc, which will do business as…' D&B parsing artifact — NOT confirmed as a school bus operator.
fit_notes: LIKELY NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Record appears to be a misclassified non-operator — address ties to forfeited tech/AI parent corp and Dascena (dissolved Delaware health-AI company), not a Hayward school-bus contractor. Recommend dropping from outreach list pending direct verification.

name: A2B Transportation
districts_or_customers: Primarily luxury/charter group transportation in NJ-NYC corridor (weddings, corporate, event, school field trips). No confirmed home-to-school contracts.
recent_news: No M&A news. Brand operates as A2B Transportation Inc / a2btransportation.org and a2bconnect.org marketing 56-passenger motorcoaches; also a separate FMCSA-registered 'A2B Transportation Services LLC' (USDOT 4277328). East Orange entity address matches the rank 1266 record.
fit_notes: Appears to be a luxury motorcoach/charter operator rather than a yellow-school-bus contractor — only incidental school-trip work. Low fit for Summit's home-to-school tuck-in thesis unless a separate school-bus line of business can be confirmed.
